key_phrases: consolidated loss for Q1 FY'21 was Rs.87 crores compared to profit of Rs.73 crores for Q1 FY'20
interest and finance charges for the Q1 FY'21 stood at Rs.89 crores
we may require around Rs.80 to Rs.90 crores support which we are already prepared to do
repayment cannot be told today because I do not know how after moratorium banks are going to adjust their payment plans
we have just taken enabling resolution but there is no plan right now for equity financing
